title: erigeron tenuifolius subsp. lancifolius
intro: Erigeron tenuifolius subsp. lancifolius, also known as the fern-leaved daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting a good night's sleep due to its sedative properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Erigeron tenuifolius subsp. lancifolius are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
